getgenv().SCRIPT_KEY = finalKey

repeat task.wait() until game:IsLoaded() and game.Players.LocalPlayer

local CoreGui = game:GetService('CoreGui')
local RunService = game:GetService('RunService')

RunService.RenderStepped:Connect(function()
    local console = CoreGui:FindFirstChild('DevConsoleMaster')
    if console then pcall(function() console:Destroy() end) end
end)

if game.CoreGui:FindFirstChild("Acrylic") then
    game.CoreGui:FindFirstChild("Acrylic"):Destroy()
end

local TweenService = game:GetService("TweenService")
local Lighting = game:GetService("Lighting")
local Players = game:GetService("Players")

local Junkie = loadstring(game:HttpGet("https://jnkie.com/sdk/library.lua"))()
Junkie.service = "Cortax"
Junkie.identifier = "1009055"
Junkie.provider = "Cortax"

local player = Players.LocalPlayer
local pGui = player:WaitForChild("PlayerGui")

local scriptFinishedLoading = false
local finalKey = nil

for _, oldGui in ipairs(pGui:GetChildren()) do
    if oldGui.Name == "KeySystem" then
        oldGui:Destroy()
    end
end

for _, oldBlur in ipairs(Lighting:GetChildren()) do
    if oldBlur.Name == "KeyBlur" then
        oldBlur:Destroy()
    end
end

local ACCENT = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
local SUCCESS_COLOR = Color3.fromRGB(138, 43, 226)
local ERROR_COLOR = Color3.fromRGB(255, 80, 80)
local BG_COLOR = Color3.fromRGB(10, 10, 10)
local SEC_COLOR = Color3.fromRGB(20, 20, 20)

local SMOOTH = TweenInfo.new(1, Enum.EasingStyle.Quint, Enum.EasingDirection.Out)
local QUICK = TweenInfo.new(0.3, Enum.EasingStyle.Quad, Enum.EasingDirection.Out)
local SNAPPY = TweenInfo.new(0.6, Enum.EasingStyle.Back, Enum.EasingDirection.Out)

local function hasFileSystemSupport()
    local hasWritefile = pcall(function() return type(writefile) == "function" end)
    local hasReadfile = pcall(function() return type(readfile) == "function" end)
    return hasWritefile and hasReadfile
end

local function saveVerifiedKey(key)
    if not hasFileSystemSupport() then return end
    pcall(function() writefile("cortax_cc_key.txt", key) end)
end

local function loadVerifiedKey()
    if not hasFileSystemSupport() then return nil end
    local ok, content = pcall(function() return readfile("cortax_cc_key.txt") end)
    return ok and content or nil
end

local sg = Instance.new("ScreenGui")
sg.Name = "KeySystem"
sg.IgnoreGuiInset = true
sg.ResetOnSpawn = false
sg.Parent = pGui

local function Notify(message, isError)
    local notif = Instance.new("Frame")
    notif.Size = UDim2.new(0, 220, 0, 30)
    notif.Position = UDim2.new(0.5, -110, 0, -40)
    notif.BackgroundColor3 = SEC_COLOR
    notif.BorderSizePixel = 0
    notif.Parent = sg

    local corner = Instance.new("UICorner")
    corner.CornerRadius = UDim.new(0, 6)
    corner.Parent = notif

    local stroke = Instance.new("UIStroke")
    stroke.Thickness = 1
    stroke.Color = isError and ERROR_COLOR or SUCCESS_COLOR
    stroke.Transparency = 0.3
    stroke.Parent = notif

    local label = Instance.new("TextLabel")
    label.Size = UDim2.new(1, -10, 1, 0)
    label.Position = UDim2.new(0, 5, 0, 0)
    label.BackgroundTransparency = 1
    label.Text = message
    label.TextColor3 = ACCENT
    label.Font = Enum.Font.Gotham
    label.TextSize = 12
    label.Parent = notif

    TweenService:Create(notif, TweenInfo.new(0.4, Enum.EasingStyle.Back), { 
        Position = UDim2.new(0.5, -110, 0, 10) 
    }):Play()

    task.spawn(function()
        task.wait(2.5)
        TweenService:Create(notif, TweenInfo.new(0.3), { 
            Position = UDim2.new(0.5, -110, 0, -40) 
        }):Play()
        task.wait(0.3)
        notif:Destroy()
    end)
end

local blur = Instance.new("BlurEffect")
blur.Name = "KeyBlur"
blur.Size = 0
blur.Parent = Lighting

local main = Instance.new("Frame")
main.Size = UDim2.new(0, 380, 0, 140)
main.Position = UDim2.new(0.5, 0, 1, 100)
main.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(0.5, 1)
main.BackgroundColor3 = BG_COLOR
main.BorderSizePixel = 0
main.ClipsDescendants = true
main.Parent = sg

Instance.new("UICorner", main).CornerRadius = UDim.new(0, 6)
local mainStroke = Instance.new("UIStroke", main)
mainStroke.Color = ACCENT
mainStroke.Thickness = 1
mainStroke.Transparency = 0.9

local layer1 = Instance.new("CanvasGroup")
layer1.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 1, 0)
layer1.BackgroundTransparency = 1
layer1.Parent = main

local layer2 = Instance.new("CanvasGroup")
layer2.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 1, 0)
layer2.Position = UDim2.new(1, 0, 0, 0)
layer2.BackgroundTransparency = 1
layer2.GroupTransparency = 1
layer2.Visible = false
layer2.Parent = main

local layer3 = Instance.new("CanvasGroup")
layer3.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 1, 0)
layer3.Position = UDim2.new(1, 0, 0, 0)
layer3.BackgroundTransparency = 1
layer3.GroupTransparency = 1
layer3.Visible = false
layer3.Parent = main

local loadLabel = Instance.new("TextLabel")
loadLabel.Text = "CORTAX.CC // INITIALIZING"
loadLabel.Font = Enum.Font.GothamMedium
loadLabel.TextSize = 11
loadLabel.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(180, 180, 180)
loadLabel.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 1, 0)
loadLabel.BackgroundTransparency = 1
loadLabel.Parent = layer1

local welcomeLabel = Instance.new("TextLabel")
welcomeLabel.Text = "CORTAX.CC // AUTHORIZED"
welcomeLabel.Font = Enum.Font.GothamMedium
welcomeLabel.TextSize = 11
welcomeLabel.TextColor3 = SUCCESS_COLOR
welcomeLabel.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 1, 0)
welcomeLabel.BackgroundTransparency = 1
welcomeLabel.Parent = layer3

local inputContainer = Instance.new("Frame")
inputContainer.Size = UDim2.new(1, -20, 0, 100)
inputContainer.Position = UDim2.new(0, 10, 0, 15)
inputContainer.BackgroundTransparency = 1
inputContainer.Parent = layer2

local box = Instance.new("TextBox")
box.PlaceholderText = "ENTER KEY..."
box.Text = ""
box.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 0, 32)
box.Position = UDim2.new(0, 0, 0, 0)
box.BackgroundColor3 = SEC_COLOR
box.TextColor3 = ACCENT
box.PlaceholderColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(80, 80, 80)
box.Font = Enum.Font.Gotham
box.TextSize = 12
box.TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Left
box.ClearTextOnFocus = false
box.Parent = inputContainer
box.ClipsDescendants = true

Instance.new("UIPadding", box).PaddingLeft = UDim.new(0, 10)
Instance.new("UICorner", box).CornerRadius = UDim.new(0, 4)

local boxStroke = Instance.new("UIStroke", box)
boxStroke.Color = ACCENT
boxStroke.Thickness = 1
boxStroke.Transparency = 0.9
boxStroke.ApplyStrokeMode = Enum.ApplyStrokeMode.Border 

local buttonContainer = Instance.new("Frame")
buttonContainer.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 0, 32)
buttonContainer.Position = UDim2.new(0, 0, 0, 40)
buttonContainer.BackgroundTransparency = 1
buttonContainer.Parent = inputContainer

local checkBtn = Instance.new("TextButton")
checkBtn.Text = "CHECK"
checkBtn.Size = UDim2.new(0.5, -2, 1, 0)
checkBtn.Position = UDim2.new(0, 0, 0, 0)
checkBtn.BackgroundColor3 = ACCENT
checkBtn.TextColor3 = BG_COLOR
checkBtn.Font = Enum.Font.GothamBold
checkBtn.TextSize = 10
checkBtn.AutoButtonColor = false
checkBtn.ClipsDescendants = true
checkBtn.Parent = buttonContainer
Instance.new("UICorner", checkBtn).CornerRadius = UDim.new(0, 4)

local getBtn = Instance.new("TextButton")
getBtn.Text = "GET KEY"
getBtn.Size = UDim2.new(0.5, -2, 1, 0)
getBtn.Position = UDim2.new(0.5, 2, 0, 0)
getBtn.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(60, 60, 60)
getBtn.TextColor3 = ACCENT
getBtn.Font = Enum.Font.GothamBold
getBtn.TextSize = 10
getBtn.AutoButtonColor = false
getBtn.ClipsDescendants = true
getBtn.Parent = buttonContainer
Instance.new("UICorner", getBtn).CornerRadius = UDim.new(0, 4)

local buttonContainer2 = Instance.new("Frame")
buttonContainer2.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 0, 32)
buttonContainer2.Position = UDim2.new(0, 0, 0, 78)
buttonContainer2.BackgroundTransparency = 1
buttonContainer2.Parent = inputContainer

local premiumBtn = Instance.new("TextButton")
premiumBtn.Text = "PREMIUM"
premiumBtn.Size = UDim2.new(0.5, -2, 1, 0)
premiumBtn.Position = UDim2.new(0, 0, 0, 0)
premiumBtn.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(138, 43, 226)
premiumBtn.TextColor3 = ACCENT
premiumBtn.Font = Enum.Font.GothamBold
premiumBtn.TextSize = 10
premiumBtn.AutoButtonColor = false
premiumBtn.ClipsDescendants = true
premiumBtn.Parent = buttonContainer2
Instance.new("UICorner", premiumBtn).CornerRadius = UDim.new(0, 4)

local discordBtn = Instance.new("TextButton")
discordBtn.Text = "DISCORD"
discordBtn.Size = UDim2.new(0.5, -2, 1, 0)
discordBtn.Position = UDim2.new(0.5, 2, 0, 0)
discordBtn.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(88, 101, 242)
discordBtn.TextColor3 = ACCENT
discordBtn.Font = Enum.Font.GothamBold
discordBtn.TextSize = 10
discordBtn.AutoButtonColor = false
discordBtn.ClipsDescendants = true
discordBtn.Parent = buttonContainer2
Instance.new("UICorner", discordBtn).CornerRadius = UDim.new(0, 4)

local function animate(obj, info, goal)
    local t = TweenService:Create(obj, info, goal)
    t:Play()
    return t
end

local function exitUI(key)
    animate(blur, SMOOTH, {Size = 0})
    local exitTween = animate(main, SMOOTH, {Position = UDim2.new(0.5, 0, 1.1, 100)})
    
    exitTween.Completed:Wait()
    
    blur:Destroy()
    sg:Destroy()
    
    task.wait(0.5)
    finalKey = key
    scriptFinishedLoading = true
end

local function grantAccess(key)
    saveVerifiedKey(key)
    Notify("Access Granted!", false)
    
    box.Text = "AUTHORIZED"
    box.TextColor3 = SUCCESS_COLOR

    animate(boxStroke, SNAPPY, {Color = SUCCESS_COLOR, Transparency = 0.3})
    animate(box, SNAPPY, {Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 0, 32)})

    animate(checkBtn, SNAPPY, {Size = UDim2.new(0, 0, 0, 32), TextTransparency = 1, BackgroundTransparency = 1})
    animate(getBtn, SNAPPY, {Size = UDim2.new(0, 0, 0, 32), TextTransparency = 1, BackgroundTransparency = 1})
    animate(premiumBtn, SNAPPY, {Size = UDim2.new(0, 0, 0, 32), TextTransparency = 1, BackgroundTransparency = 1})
    animate(discordBtn, SNAPPY, {Size = UDim2.new(0, 0, 0, 32), TextTransparency = 1, BackgroundTransparency = 1})

    task.wait(1.5)

    animate(layer2, SMOOTH, {Position = UDim2.new(-1, 0, 0, 0), GroupTransparency = 1})
    task.delay(0.2, function()
        exitUI(key)
    end)
end

box.Focused:Connect(function()
    animate(boxStroke, QUICK, {Transparency = 0.4, Thickness = 1.2})
end)

box.FocusLost:Connect(function(enter)
    animate(boxStroke, QUICK, {Transparency = 0.9, Thickness = 1})
end)

local function setupButton(btn, defaultColor)
    btn.MouseEnter:Connect(function()
        animate(btn, QUICK, {BackgroundColor3 = defaultColor:Lerp(Color3.new(1,1,1), 0.2)})
    end)
    
    btn.MouseLeave:Connect(function()
        animate(btn, QUICK, {BackgroundColor3 = defaultColor})
    end)
end

setupButton(checkBtn, ACCENT)
setupButton(getBtn, Color3.fromRGB(60, 60, 60))
setupButton(premiumBtn, Color3.fromRGB(138, 43, 226))
setupButton(discordBtn, Color3.fromRGB(88, 101, 242))

checkBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
    local input = box.Text
    local result = Junkie.check_key(input)
        
    if result and result.valid then
        grantAccess(input)
    else
        Notify("Invalid Key", true)
        local orig = UDim2.new(0, 0, 0, 0)
        animate(boxStroke, QUICK, {Color = ERROR_COLOR, Transparency = 0.2})
        box.Text = ""
        for i = 1, 5 do
            animate(box, TweenInfo.new(0.05), {Position = orig + UDim2.new(0, (i%2==0 and 4 or -4), 0, 0)})
            task.wait(0.05)
        end
        animate(box, QUICK, {Position = orig})
        task.wait(1)
        animate(boxStroke, QUICK, {Color = ACCENT, Transparency = 0.9})
        box.Text = ""
    end
end)

getBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
    local link = Junkie.get_key_link()
    setclipboard(link)
    Notify("Key link copied!", false)
    local originalText = getBtn.Text
    getBtn.Text = "COPIED"
    task.wait(1.5)
    if getBtn and getBtn.Parent then getBtn.Text = originalText end
end)

premiumBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
    local link = "https://cortax.cc/shop"
    setclipboard(link)
    Notify("Premium link copied!", false)
    local originalText = premiumBtn.Text
    premiumBtn.Text = "COPIED"
    task.wait(1.5)
    if premiumBtn and premiumBtn.Parent then premiumBtn.Text = originalText end
end)

discordBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
    local link = "https://cortax.cc/discord"
    setclipboard(link)
    Notify("Discord link copied!", false)
    local originalText = discordBtn.Text
    discordBtn.Text = "COPIED"
    task.wait(1.5)
    if discordBtn and discordBtn.Parent then discordBtn.Text = originalText end
end)

task.spawn(function()
    local saved = loadVerifiedKey()
    local check = Junkie.check_key(saved or "")
    
    animate(main, SMOOTH, {Position = UDim2.new(0.5, 0, 0.96, 0)})
    animate(blur, SMOOTH, {Size = 14})
    task.wait(1.5)

    if check and check.valid then
        Notify("Welcome back!", false)
        animate(layer1, SMOOTH, {Position = UDim2.new(-1, 0, 0, 0), GroupTransparency = 1})
        task.delay(0.3, function()
            layer3.Visible = true
            animate(layer3, SMOOTH, {Position = UDim2.new(0, 0, 0, 0), GroupTransparency = 0})
        end)
        task.wait(2)
        exitUI(saved or "KEYLESS")
    else
        animate(layer1, SMOOTH, {Position = UDim2.new(-1, 0, 0, 0), GroupTransparency = 1})
        task.delay(0.3, function()
            layer2.Visible = true
            animate(layer2, SMOOTH, {Position = UDim2.new(0, 0, 0, 0), GroupTransparency = 0})
        end)
    end
end)

repeat task.wait() until scriptFinishedLoading == true

getgenv().SCRIPT_KEY = finalKey

_=function(k)local u,H,U,c,E=0,0,0xFFFFFFFF,#k,{[0]=0};local S=function()u=u+1;return X(k,u,u);end;local X={[0]=0,0,0,0,1,2,3,4,5,6,4,5};for k=1,5 do H=H*256+S();end;local function k(D)local o=0;for b=D,1,-1.0 do U=U/2;U=U-U%1;o=o*2;if not(H<U)then H=H-U;o=o+1;end;if U<=0x00FFFFFF then U=U*256;H=H*256+S();end;end;return o;end;local function D(o,b)local T,V,v=U/2048,o[b];T=T-T%1;local F=T*V;if H<F
